title: Krummelpap – to fill you up nicely

seo.title: Krummelpap - to fill you up nicely - Marinda Kook

html:
Krummelpap can be eaten with a braai. It can also be served with boerewors and gravy. The best part of the pap is usually its sauce. If you want to eat it for breakfast you can serve it with warm milk and sugar.

  • 1 l water
  • 750 ml maize meal
  • 5 ml salt
  • 20 ml butter

NOW:

  1. In a pot on the stove, bring the water and salt to the boil.
  2. Add the maize meal and give it one stir. Let it cook for 15 minutes without stirring.
  3. Now stir it through with a large fork. It will look crumbly.
  4. Stir in the butter and let it simmer gently for an hour. Put the lid on while it's cooking now.

You can now make a smoored sauce (tomato sauce) by warming two tins of tomato and onion mix in the microwave or on the stove. Stir in 100 ml Worcester sauce, 125 ml chutney, 10 ml sugar, salt and pepper. Heat everything through nicely and eat it with your pap. If you like a “hot” sauce you can add Tabasco to taste.
